amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 26 — paragraph 5 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 26 — paragraph 5 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

5 a. Importers shall cooperate with national competent authorities on any action those authorities take to reduce and mitigate the risks posed by the high-risk AI system.
parliament_text: 5 a. Importers shall cooperate with national competent authorities on any action those authorities take to reduce and mitigate the risks posed by the high-risk AI system.
